title: Syrian Stilton Bruschetta
description: A flavorful appetizer combining the richness of Stilton cheese with the crunch of Syrian flatbread.
instructions: Brush the Syrian flatbread slices with olive oil and season with salt.
Transfer the flatbread squares to a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and top each square with crumbled Stilton cheese.
Return the flatbread to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh thyme and serve immediately.
